category_sources: source_facts.description says it is linguistic software and a Finnish dictionary.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name provides libvoikko; source_facts.homepage is the official Voikko site for the same project family.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Voikko site; its docs.html page is the dedicated official documentation page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official source_facts.source-archive provides release source, but no official source-control repository URL was present in the input.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies linguistic software and Finnish dictionary; source_facts.executables includes voikkospell, voikkohyphenate, and voikkogc.
